title: stelis longissima
intro: Stelis longissima, also known as the "Long Leaf Orchid", is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which are believed to include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Stelis longissima are thought to include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
